## Code Review Checklist

### Author Self-Review

- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have added/updated Javadoc for public APIs
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally
- [ ] I have checked that my changes don't break any existing functionality

### Reviewer Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project conventions and style guidelines
- [ ] Business logic is correct and complete
- [ ] Error handling is appropriate
- [ ] No security vulnerabilities introduced
- [ ] No unnecessary dependencies added
- [ ] Database migrations are safe and reversible (if applicable)
- [ ] API changes are backward compatible (if applicable)
- [ ] Documentation is updated (if applicable)
